name: Baked Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice in 1-1/2 cups boiling salted water for 35 minutes or until tender. Drain if necessary and set aside.
2. Cut peppers in half, remove seeds and white membrane. Parboil peppers in boiling salted water for 5 minutes. Arrange in a lightly oiled shallow baking dish.
3. Melt butter in a small skillet. Add onion, celery, and sunflower seeds. Saute until onion is tender.
4. Remove from heat. Stir into rice. Add parsley, eggs, oregano, chiles, black pepper, and salt to taste.
5. Fill peppers with mixture. Sprinkle cheese on top.
6. Put about 1/3 cup hot water in the bottom of the dish.
7. Bake at 400°F for about 20 minutes.
Good served with: Stewed tomatoes and corn bread (bake cornbread along with peppers).
